name: db-grid-monorepo
description: db-grid — Excel-like React data grid (@deepbratt55/db-grid): formulas, clipboard, grouping, pivot, sparklines, SSRM

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,demo,license -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @db-grid/api" "npm run dev -w @db-grid/demo" "npm run dev -w @db-grid/license-dashboard"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @deepbratt55/db-grid && npm run build -w @db-grid/ui && npm run build -w @db-grid/full && npm run build -w @db-grid/api && npm run build -w @db-grid/demo && npm run build -w @db-grid/license-dashboard
